ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tubing_specifications" (
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number for each tubing specification */,
  "id_in" REAL /* Internal diameter of the tubing in inches */,
  "od_in" REAL /* Outer diameter of the tubing in inches */,
  "tube_thickness_in" REAL /* Thickness of the tubing in inches */,
  "wp_psig" INTEGER /* Working pressure rating in pounds per square inch (PSIG) */,
  "weight_lbs_ft" REAL /* Weight of the tubing in pounds per foot */,
  "std_length" TEXT /* Standard length of the tubing */,
  "stock_availability" TEXT /* Stock availability status or minimum order quantity */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material used for the tubing */,
  "temperature_rating_f" REAL /* Maximum temperature rating in Fahrenheit */,
  "pressure_rating_psi" REAL /* Pressure rating in pounds per square inch (PSI) */,
  "fluid_type" TEXT /* Type of fluid the tubing is designed for */,
  "end_type" TEXT /* Type of end fitting on the tubing */,
  "connection_type" TEXT /* Type of connection used for the tubing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the supplier's address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the supplier's address */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier's address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the supplier's address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_tubing" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the tubing supplied */,
  "supply_date" TEXT /* Date when the tubing was supplied */,
  "quantity_supplied" INTEGER /* Quantity of tubing supplied */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the tubing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id", "part_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the tubing in inventory */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Current available quantity of the tubing */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold quantity for reorder alerts */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock reaches the reorder level */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse where the tubing is stored */,
  "aisle" TEXT /* Aisle number where the tubing is stored */,
  "bin_number" TEXT /* Bin number where the tubing is stored */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_part_number FOREIGN KEY ("part_number") REFERENCES tubing_specifications ("part_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the tubing ordered */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of tubing ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Pending, Completed, Canceled) */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer who placed the order */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "ship_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_part_number FOREIGN KEY ("part_number") REFERENCES tubing_specifications ("part_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production batch */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the tubing produced in this batch */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the production batch was created */,
  "quantity_produced" INTEGER /* Total quantity produced in the batch */,
  "quality_check_passed" INTEGER /* Indicates if quality checks for the batch were passed */,
  "quality_check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was performed */,
  "quality_check_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the quality check */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_batches_part_number FOREIGN KEY ("part_number") REFERENCES tubing_specifications ("part_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales, inventory manager, admin) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
